Simple Program Using Async/Await to Fetch User Data from API
HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<body>

<script>
async function getUser() {
    let response = await fetch("https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1");
    let data = await response.json();

    document.write("Name: " + data.name);
}

getUser();
</script>

</body>
</html>
Output
Name: Leanne Graham
Explanation

async makes the function asynchronous.

await waits for the API response.

fetch() gets data from the API.

response.json() converts the response into JSON format.

document.write() displays the user's name.

✅ Short, simple, and easy to understand for exams.

What is full form of toc subject in 3 rd com science engineering

In 3rd year Computer Science Engineering, TOC stands for Theory of Computation.

It is a subject that deals with the mathematical models of computation and the capabilities and limitations of computers.

Major topics include:

Finite Automata (FA)

Regular Expressions

Context-Free Grammar (CFG)

Pushdown Automata (PDA)

Turing Machines

Decidability and Computability

Chomsky Hierarchy

It is a core subject in Computer Science and helps understand how programming languages and compilers work.
In sppu which sem did this subject

In SPPU (Savitribai Phule Pune University) Computer Engineering, TOC (Theory of Computation) is taught in Third Year Engineering (TE), Semester V (Sem 5). It is the first semester of the third year under the 2019 pattern. 
AIT Pune
+1

So the year-wise structure is:

SE (Second Year) → Sem 3 & Sem 4

TE (Third Year) → Sem 5 & Sem 6

BE (Final Year) → Sem 7 & Sem 8

Therefore, TOC is a TE Sem 5 subject.
